title: Monday Music Mix #12
summary: Welcome to Monday Music Mix - Crowdsourced edition! This week’s mix features some great tracks, handpicked by some of you. A big thanks to Nitin, Ananya, Joogz, fine_whining, Coke, and Cyrus for some fantastic suggestions. I haven’t been able to feature all the excellent which has been suggested last week (sorry Shreyansh, jigabachi and others) - but I promise to feature it in coming weeks - please bear with me :)

legacy.descriptionHtml:
Twelfth

Welcome to Monday Music Mix - Crowdsourced edition! This week’s mix features some great tracks, handpicked by some of you. A big thanks to Nitin, Ananya, Joogz, fine_whining, Coke, and Cyrus for some fantastic suggestions. I haven’t been able to feature all the excellent which has been suggested last week (sorry Shreyansh, jigabachi and others) - but I promise to feature it in coming weeks - please bear with me :)

So without further ado:

Monday Music Mix: 12

Tracklist:

  1. The Books - Tokyo
  2. Guster - Satellite
  3. Chairlift - Bruises
  4. Paolo Nutini - New Shoes
  5. Luke Doucet And The White Falcon - Monkeys
  6. Wax Tailor - Que Sera
  7. Belleruche - Clockwatching

* Tracks in blue indicate my favourites

Download album (zip format)

Subscribe to Monday Music Mix podcast (coming whenever I stop feeling lazy)

Listen to Grooveshark playlist *NEW*

Like what you heard? Send some love through the comments section, if you please.
legacy.favoriteTrackCue: * Tracks in blue indicate my favourites
